title: Planetary Sampling Automation Development Intern
short_desc: Developed reinforcement learning-based automation for a space drill in the ARADS project.
highlights: The ARADS project aims to use a space drill to take regolith samples on the moon or Mars reliably without human intervention.|Developed an automation strategy for the space drill to reach goal depth quickly while avoiding faults.|Designed and implemented a data-efficient Dyna-style reinforcement learning algorithm for the space drill.|Led collaboration with domain experts and mentored two undergraduate researchers.|Demonstrated algorithm performance on a simplified drill model showing ability to learn system dynamics and improve policy over time.|Authored comprehensive technical documentation to ensure smooth project continuation and knowledge transfer.

title: Implementation Consultant (Developer)
short_desc: Built bilingual tax software for Puerto Rico's Department of Treasury using Visual Basic and SQL.
highlights: Created a new Incentives Return for taxpayers in Puerto Rico with a small bilingual team under a tight deadline.|Worked closely with the Puerto Rico Department of Treasury in Spanish to correctly validate information submitted by taxpayers.|Transformed business requests into software changes by writing or modifying Visual Basic code and editing configuration tables.|Researched problems by querying taxpayer data using Microsoft SQL Server Management Studio.|Resolved errors in both the government-employee software and the taxpayer-facing website on the Production Support team.|Delivered solutions via unit testing, test scenarios, and migration to Testing, Staging, and Production environments.

highlights: Delivered new software features to specified requirements using the .NET Framework.|Found and fixed software defects.|Provided level 3 support to customers in the Americas combining consulting and development knowledge.|Designed and recorded the ABACUS REST API course for the Learning Management System.|Delivered online trainings to clients on ABACUS scripting and the REST API in English and Spanish.|Developed requested scripts in VB and C# for clients in collaboration with Enterprise Architects.|Built custom visualization tools including a stacked bar chart for global customers.|Wrote Knowledge Portal articles with detailed instructions for clients on scripts and visualizations.|Trained technical consultants in scripting and the REST API.
